title: chore(deps): update dependency prettier to v1.11.1 - autoclosed
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [prettier](https://github.com/prettier/prettier) from `v1.7.4` to `v1.11.1`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v1.8.0`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​180)

[link](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/compare/1.7.4...1.8.0)

* [Release Notes](https://prettier.io/blog/2017/11/07/1.8.0.html)

---

### [`v1.8.1`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​181)

[link](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/compare/1.8.0...1.8.1)

* Force JSON to no trailing comma in multiparser (#​3182 by azz)
* Don't add trailing commas in JSXAttribute for arrow functions (#​3181 by duailibe)
* Markdown: Allow more cases that `_`-style emphasis is available (#​3186 by ikatyang)
* Markdown: Handle additional spaces before `code` (#​3180 by ikatyang)
* Markdown: Do not break on unbreakable place (#​3177 by ikatyang)
* Markdown: Do not break before special prefix (#​3172 by ikatyang)

---

### [`v1.8.2`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​182)

[link](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/compare/1.8.1...1.8.2)

* Markdown: Don't break on links (#​3204 by ikatyang)
* Markdown: Add `--no-prose-wrap` option (#​3199 by ikatyang)
* TypeScript: Parenthesis around TSAsExpression inside TSAbstractClassDeclaration (#​3191 by duailibe)
* JSON: Print JSON top comments as leading comments of root node (#​3187 by duailibe)

---

### [`v1.9.0`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​190)

[link](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/compare/1.8.2...1.9.0)

* [Release Notes](https://prettier.io/blog/2017/12/05/1.9.0.html)

---

### [`v1.9.1`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​191)

[link](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/compare/1.9.0...1.9.1)

* Fixed a bug of comments with JSX fragments being duplicated in output (#​3398 by duailibe)
* Fixed a bug that Prettier would fail when using tabs (#​3401 by ikatyang)
* Fixed a regression that removed trailing commas when printing JS code blocks in Markdown (#​3405 by azz)
* Fixed a bug when using glob `**/*` which would try to format directories (#​3411 by duailibe)
* Fixed a bug when `.editorconfig` had `max_line_length = "off"` (#​3412 by duailibe)

---

### [`v1.9.2`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​192)

[link](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/compare/1.9.1...1.9.2)

* Fixed trailing comma not being printed in function calls if the last arg was an arrow (#​3428 by duailibe)
* Ignore whitespace after the `/**` in docblocks (#​3430 by duailibe)
* Fixed a bug where `get` and `set` class properties arrows would print an unnecessary semicolon with `--no-semi` (#​3434 by duailibe)
* Fixed a bug for missing `.editorconfig` files (#​3439 by josephfrazier)
* Fix comments being moved in class methods and object properties with the babylon parser (#​3441 by duailibe)
* Better printing of member chains with a TSNonNullExpression (`!` character) (#​3442 by duailibe)
* Fix missing commas in object properties when a `pretter-ignore` comment is present (#​3448 by duailibe)
* Fix printing union types inside a function param type (#​3446 by duailibe)
* Fix closing parens on multi-line intersection/union type (#​3436 by josephfrazier)
* Don't break single argument destructuring arguments (for arrays and with simple default values) (#​3443 by duailibe)

---

### [`v1.10.0`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1100)

[link](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/compare/1.9.2...1.10.0)

* [Release Notes](https://prettier.io/blog/2018/01/10/1.10.0.html)

---

### [`v1.10.1`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1101)

[link](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/compare/1.10.0...1.10.1)

* Fixed an issue where the CLI fails to resolve a file.

---

### [`v1.10.2`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1102)

[link](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/compare/1.10.1...1.10.2)

* Fixed an issue printing .vue files with self-closing tags. (#​3705 by duailibe)

---

### [`v1.11.0`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1110)

* [Release Notes](https://prettier.io/blog/2018/02/26/1.11.0.html)

---

### [`v1.11.1`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1111)

[link](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/compare/1.11.0...1.11.1)

* 1.11.0 was incorrectly shipped with the wrong version of the TypeScript parser, which broke conditional types. This release fixes it.
* Fixed an issue relating to deprecated parsers ([#​4072](`https://github.com/prettier/prettier/pull/4072`))

---

</details>


<details>
<summary>Commits</summary>

#### v1.11.0
-   [`0109333`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/010933375c7274190393e7541db846e8e666e9d7) Mention webstorm built-in support on homepage (#​4037)
-   [`a066812`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/a0668129da2da638237ce93910e3167a4a878d09) Do not require plugins to set 'since' field (#​4038)
-   [`5153b15`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/5153b152455c53c8ff2eea79f757a45b8bfbe4ff) Respect EditorConfig when `--config` is passed (#​3992)
-   [`29ef3f0`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/29ef3f0033ddf20924c38fa725ea8b40035ba170) Enhancing pre-commit bash script documentation. (#​3638)
-   [`c1107a8`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/c1107a86dd088c5f12bf7cd2f23a4b7634708de3) feat(markdown): respect tabWidth for list items (#​3990)
-   [`9ee113c`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/9ee113cd2e66dad5567ce03170d1c6c6dff1a310) webpack/webpack now uses Prettier (#​4039)
-   [`7919603`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/79196030a78954359cb7885ba32b984e0e960510) Webpack -> webpack
-   [`ca81bef`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/ca81bef73e0c45cea8ff89eff125976661e34d51) fix(markdown): list prefix: no unnecessary trailing spaces (#​4042)
-   [`b6c2789`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/b6c27893cc32f0ad8800b045d4e88d14e04057ba) fix(markdown): list prefix alignment: count spaces from correct place (#​4041)
-   [`65b988a`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/65b988a9896713956062f1c772e2522d9d53fdfb) feat: ignore non standard IE filter values (#​4028)
-   [`efd5bde`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/efd5bde7137c8359b99591e2f9c2f0f829b53145) Fix(typescript) non-null identifier same line in chain (#​4052)
-   [`4ddf1a6`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/4ddf1a6e8439ab4680812c398d697e4d3011fff2) fix: don't lowercase nesting selector (#​4048)
-   [`b1b504f`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/b1b504fc96b95c9f057e2f98cdcd4a124b1ecb23) 1.11 Release Notes and Changelog (#​4035)
#### v1.11.1
-   [`82492de`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/82492deb943243eb6c2479f3349b54e168814a25) Bump version to 1.11.0
-   [`51202f4`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/51202f4b6e4dc88cfa1e8ce38176ccfb077b90fb) Format 2-26 blog post with prettier
-   [`74a132c`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/74a132c4ba6e871f2e3b69f786c9082cffafe0b7) Bump own prettier dependency version to 1.11.0 (#​4058)
-   [`23f032f`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/23f032f3481bef118c604ef19e74305804e75602) Fix @​orta's link (#​4060)
-   [`d05a29d`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/d05a29da05b2084790491eaef85917ce584e4fbd) Allow plugins to override default options (#​3991)
-   [`0ce4ce3`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/0ce4ce31385e95fd2da32c72031bb35f9fc60db0) fix(api): no regression for deprecated parser (#​4072)
-   [`2897c95`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/2897c950f842f46aaebed424f3ec3d4caa930326) Try to clarify when to use the issue template (#​4059)
-   [`0f1757a`](https://github.com/prettier/prettier/commit/0f1757a834e371ec9e55022899412f7eaaf9e22d) Bump version to 1.11.1

</details>
